sentences.arabic: تَصِلُ مَرْيَمُ إِلَى مَكْتَبِهَا فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Marijam stiže u svoju kancelariju tačno u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Maryam arrives at her office at exactly eight o'clock in the morning.

sentences.arabic: تَبْدَأُ يَوْمَهَا بِقِرَاءَةِ الرَّسَائِلِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ الْهَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Započinje svoj dan čitajući važne e-mailove.
sentences.translationEn: She starts her day by reading important emails.

sentences.arabic: تُنَظِّمُ مَهَامَّهَا الْيَوْمِيَّةَ لِتَكُونَ أَكْثَرَ إِنْتَاجِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Organizira svoje dnevne zadatke kako bi bila produktivnija.
sentences.translationEn: She organizes her daily tasks to be more productive.
